title: Isolated Flower
overview: Emi Kaido's life changes when a band of otherworldly heroes rescue her from killer robots.

title: Immediate Family
overview: Emi reluctantly uses her luxury abode to protect her motley crew of warrior heroes.

title: Intelligent Fury
overview: Having learned Damian's true identity Takeshi transforms into Polimar to thwart attacks.

title: Imaginary Friend
overview: Emi is dragged to a party the team is chaperoning and Jōji encounters the seductive Belle Lynn.

title: Invisible Future
overview: Suspicions grow when an elusive guest arrives at Emi's house looking for help.

title: Infini-T Force
overview: The eccentric Damian makes an unexpected return, reminding Ken and Emi their futures are in peril.

title: Insane Father
overview: With surprise message in hand  Emi heads to a familiar place to meet a wholly unfamiliar figure. Soon  a voice from a parallel universe breaks the silence to reveal a disturbing personal story  opening the floodgates of an exchange of personal truths.

title: Inner Frustration
overview: Emi returns to life as a normal teenager, but Takeshi and Tetsuya aren't convinced.

title: In Flux
overview: Emi and Kaan are pulled into an alternate dimension, only to find Ken and the others in a brawl.

title: Ignition Flame
overview: The team has vanished  leaving Emi with a case of amnesia and another mysterious text from her father. Now  atop a Shibuya high-rise  an epic standoff with her father is about to unfold  and Emi isn't holding back.

title: Independent Flower
overview: As the Case-wielding Kaido continues to eradicate worlds, the team takes collective aim.

title: I'll Find...
overview: The city of Shibuya again pulses with life as Emi pushes onward with her new heroic heart.
